From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.

(** * PCF + References: Type Preservation — Benchmark *)

Inductive ty : Type :=
  | TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
  | Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.

Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.

Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S_ty x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S_ty (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S_ty n, has_type G S_ty (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S_ty b, has_type G S_ty (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S_ty t, has_type G S_ty t TyNat -> has_type G S_ty (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S_ty t, has_type G S_ty t TyNat -> has_type G S_ty (Pred t) TyNat
  | T_IsZero : forall G S_ty t, has_type G S_ty t TyNat -> has_type G S_ty (IsZero t) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S_ty t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S_ty t1 TyBool -> has_type G S_ty t2 T -> has_type G S_ty t3 T -> has_type G S_ty (If t1 t2 t3) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S_ty T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S_ty t T2 -> has_type G S_ty (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S_ty t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S_ty t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S_ty t2 T1 -> has_type G S_ty (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S_ty t T, has_type (T :: G) S_ty t T -> has_type G S_ty (Fix t) T
  | T_Ref : forall G S_ty t T, has_type G S_ty t T -> has_type G S_ty (Ref t) (TyRef T)
  | T_Deref : forall G S_ty t T, has_type G S_ty t (TyRef T) -> has_type G S_ty (Deref t) T
  | T_Assign : forall G S_ty t1 t2 T, has_type G S_ty t1 (TyRef T) -> has_type G S_ty t2 T -> has_type G S_ty (Assign t1 t2) TyNat
  | T_Loc : forall G S_ty l T, nth_error S_ty l = Some T -> has_type G S_ty (Loc l) (TyRef T).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
  | V_Num : forall n, value (Num n)
  | V_Bool : forall b, value (BOOL b)
  | V_Lam : forall T t, value (Lam T t)
  | V_Loc : forall l, value (Loc l).

Fixpoint shift_at (d : nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | Var x => if x <? d then Var x else Var (x + 1)
  | Num n => Num n | BOOL b => BOOL b
  | Succ t1 => Succ (shift_at d t1) | Pred t1 => Pred (shift_at d t1)
  | IsZero t1 => IsZero (shift_at d t1)
  | If t1 t2 t3 => If (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2) (shift_at d t3)
  | Lam T t1 => Lam T (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | App t1 t2 => App (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Fix t1 => Fix (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | Ref t1 => Ref (shift_at d t1) | Deref t1 => Deref (shift_at d t1)
  | Assign t1 t2 => Assign (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Loc l => Loc l
  end.

Definition shift (t : tm) : tm := shift_at 0 t.

Fixpoint subst (j : nat) (s t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | Var x => if Nat.eqb x j then s else Var x
  | Num n => Num n | BOOL b => BOOL b
  | Succ t1 => Succ (subst j s t1) | Pred t1 => Pred (subst j s t1)
  | IsZero t1 => IsZero (subst j s t1)
  | If t1 t2 t3 => If (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2) (subst j s t3)
  | Lam T t1 => Lam T (subst (S j) (shift s) t1)
  | App t1 t2 => App (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2)
  | Fix t1 => Fix (subst (S j) (shift s) t1)
  | Ref t1 => Ref (subst j s t1) | Deref t1 => Deref (subst j s t1)
  | Assign t1 t2 => Assign (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2)
  | Loc l => Loc l
  end.

Definition heap := list (nat * tm).

Fixpoint heap_lookup (l : nat) (mu : heap) : option tm :=
  match mu with
  | [] => None
  | (l', v) :: mu' => if Nat.eqb l l' then Some v else heap_lookup l mu'
  end.

Fixpoint heap_update (l : nat) (v : tm) (mu : heap) : heap :=
  match mu with
  | [] => []
  | (l', v') :: mu' => if Nat.eqb l l' then (l, v) :: mu'
                        else (l', v') :: heap_update l v mu'
  end.

Inductive heap_ok : heap -> store_ty -> Prop :=
  | heap_empty : forall S_ty, heap_ok [] S_ty
  | heap_cons : forall l v mu S_ty T, heap_ok mu S_ty -> has_type [] S_ty v T -> nth_error S_ty l = Some T -> heap_ok ((l, v) :: mu) S_ty.

Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_Succ : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu'
  | S_PredZero : forall mu, step (Pred (Num 0)) mu (Num 0) mu
  | S_PredSucc : forall n mu, step (Pred (Num (S n))) mu (Num n) mu
  | S_Pred : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Pred t) mu (Pred t') mu'
  | S_IsZeroZero : forall mu, step (IsZero (Num 0)) mu (BOOL true) mu
  | S_IsZeroSucc : forall n mu, step (IsZero (Num (S n))) mu (BOOL false) mu
  | S_IsZero : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (IsZero t) mu (IsZero t') mu'
  | S_IfTrue : forall t1 t2 mu, step (If (BOOL true) t1 t2) mu t1 mu
  | S_IfFalse : forall t1 t2 mu, step (If (BOOL false) t1 t2) mu t2 mu
  | S_If : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2 t3, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (If t1 t2 t3) mu (If t1' t2 t3) mu'
  | S_App1 : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (App t1 t2) mu (App t1' t2) mu'
  | S_App2 : forall v1 t2 mu t2' mu', value v1 -> step t2 mu t2' mu' -> step (App v1 t2) mu (App v1 t2') mu'
  | S_AppAbs : forall T t1 v2 mu, value v2 -> step (App (Lam T t1) v2) mu (subst 0 v2 t1) mu
  | S_Fix : forall t mu, step (Fix t) mu (subst 0 (Fix t) t) mu
  | S_Ref : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Ref t) mu (Ref t') mu'
  | S_RefV : forall v mu, value v -> step (Ref v) mu (Loc (length mu)) ((length mu, v) :: mu)
  | S_Deref : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Deref t) mu (Deref t') mu'
  | S_DerefLoc : forall l mu v, heap_lookup l mu = Some v -> step (Deref (Loc l)) mu v mu
  | S_Assign1 : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (Assign t1 t2) mu (Assign t1' t2) mu'
  | S_Assign2 : forall l t2 mu t2' mu', step t2 mu t2' mu' -> step (Assign (Loc l) t2) mu (Assign (Loc l) t2') mu'
  | S_AssignV : forall l v mu, value v -> step (Assign (Loc l) v) mu (Num 0) (heap_update l v mu).

Definition extends (S' S0 : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S0 ++ S2.

(** ** Auxiliary Lemmas *)

Lemma extends_refl : forall S_ty, extends S_ty S_ty.
Proof. intro S_ty. exists []. reflexivity. Qed.

Lemma extends_app : forall S_ty S2, extends (S_ty ++ S2) S_ty.
Proof. intros. exists S2. auto. Qed.

Lemma nth_error_app_left : forall (A : Type) (l1 l2 : list A) (n : nat) (x : A),
  nth_error l1 n = Some x ->
  nth_error (l1 ++ l2) n = Some x.
Proof.
  induction l1; intros; simpl in *.
  - destruct n; inversion H.
  - destruct n; simpl; auto.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_app_right : forall (A : Type) (l1 l2 : list A) (n : nat) (x : A),
  nth_error l2 n = Some x ->
  nth_error (l1 ++ l2) (length l1 + n) = Some x.
Proof.
  induction l1; intros; simpl.
  - auto.
  - apply IHl1. auto.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_extends : forall S_ty S_ty' l T,
  extends S_ty' S_ty ->
  nth_error S_ty l = Some T ->
  nth_error S_ty' l = Some T.
Proof.
  intros S_ty S_ty' l T [S2 ->].
  apply nth_error_app_left. auto.
Qed.

Lemma has_type_weakening_store : forall G S_ty t T S_ty',
  has_type G S_ty t T ->
  extends S_ty' S_ty ->
  has_type G S_ty' t T.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros S_ty' Hext.
  - apply T_Var; auto.
  - apply T_Num.
  - apply T_Bool.
  - apply T_Succ; apply IHhas_type; auto.
  - apply T_Pred; apply IHhas_type; auto.
  - apply T_IsZero; apply IHhas_type; auto.
  - apply T_If; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2 | apply IHhas_type3]; auto.
  - apply T_Lam; apply IHhas_type; auto.
  - apply T_App; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2]; auto.
  - apply T_Fix; apply IHhas_type; auto.
  - apply T_Ref; apply IHhas_type; auto.
  - apply T_Deref; apply IHhas_type; auto.
  - apply T_Assign; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2]; auto.
  - apply T_Loc. eapply nth_error_extends; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_ok_extends : forall mu S_ty S_ty',
  heap_ok mu S_ty ->
  extends S_ty' S_ty ->
  heap_ok mu S_ty'.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros S_ty' Hext.
  - apply heap_empty.
  - apply heap_cons with (T := T); auto.
    + apply IHheap_ok; auto.
    + eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto.
    + eapply nth_error_extends; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Store Typing Extension for Allocation *)

Fixpoint replicate_ty (n : nat) : store_ty :=
  match n with
  | 0 => []
  | S n' => TyNat :: replicate_ty n'
  end.

Lemma length_replicate_ty : forall n, length (replicate_ty n) = n.
Proof. induction n; simpl; auto. Qed.

Definition store_extend (S_ty : store_ty) (n : nat) (T : ty) : store_ty :=
  S_ty ++ replicate_ty (n - length S_ty) ++ [T].

Lemma store_extend_extends : forall S_ty n T,
  extends (store_extend S_ty n T) S_ty.
Proof.
  intros. unfold store_extend.
  exists (replicate_ty (n - length S_ty) ++ [T]). auto.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_pad_right : forall k T,
  nth_error (replicate_ty k ++ [T]) k = Some T.
Proof.
  induction k; simpl; auto.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_store_extend : forall S_ty n T,
  n >= length S_ty ->
  nth_error (store_extend S_ty n T) n = Some T.
Proof.
  intros S_ty n T Hge. unfold store_extend.
  assert (Hn : n = length S_ty + (n - length S_ty)) by lia.
  set (k := n - length S_ty).
  rewrite Hn at 1.
  apply nth_error_app_right.
  apply nth_error_pad_right.
Qed.

Lemma length_store_extend : forall S_ty n T,
  length (store_extend S_ty n T) = Nat.succ n.
Proof.
  intros S_ty n T. unfold store_extend.
  rewrite app_length. simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl.
  rewrite length_replicate_ty. lia.
Qed.

(** ** Shift Lemma *)

Lemma nth_error_insert : forall (A : Type) (G1 G2 : list A) (U : A) x,
  nth_error (G1 ++ U :: G2) (if x <? length G1 then x else x + 1) =
  nth_error (G1 ++ G2) x.
Proof.
  induction G1 as [|a G1]; intros G2 U x; simpl.
  - destruct x; simpl.
    + reflexivity.
    + rewrite Nat.add_1_r. reflexivity.
  - destruct x; simpl.
    + reflexivity.
    + apply IHG1.
Qed.

Lemma shift_at_typing : forall G1 G2 S_ty t T U,
  has_type (G1 ++ G2) S_ty t T ->
  has_type (G1 ++ U :: G2) S_ty (shift_at (length G1) t) T.
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl.
  - (* T_Var *)
    apply T_Var. rewrite nth_error_insert. auto.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2 | apply IHhas_type3].
  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam.
    replace (S (length G1)) with (length (T1 :: G1)) by reflexivity.
    replace (T1 :: G1 ++ U :: G2) with ((T1 :: G1) ++ U :: G2) by reflexivity.
    apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_App *)
    apply T_App; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2].
  - (* T_Fix *)
    apply T_Fix.
    replace (S (length G1)) with (length (T :: G1)) by reflexivity.
    replace (T :: G1 ++ U :: G2) with ((T :: G1) ++ U :: G2) by reflexivity.
    apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    apply T_Assign; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2].
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma shift_typing : forall G S_ty t T U,
  has_type G S_ty t T ->
  has_type (U :: G) S_ty (shift t) T.
Proof.
  intros G S_ty t T U H.
  unfold shift.
  replace (U :: G) with (([] : ctx) ++ U :: G) by reflexivity.
  replace G with (([] : ctx) ++ G) by reflexivity.
  apply shift_at_typing with (G1 := [] : ctx) (G2 := G); auto.
Qed.

(** ** Substitution Lemma *)

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall G S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (G ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type G S_ty s U ->
  has_type G S_ty (subst (length G) s t) T.
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl; intros Hs.
  - (* T_Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length G)).
    + (* x = length G *)
      subst.
      apply nth_error_app_right with (n := 0) in H. simpl in H. inversion H; subst.
      auto.
    + (* x <> length G *)
      apply T_Var.
      assert (x < length G \/ x > length G) as [Hlt | Hgt] by lia.
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H. auto.
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H.
        exfalso. apply nth_error_Some in H. lia.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHhas_type. auto.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHhas_type. auto.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHhas_type. auto.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2 | apply IHhas_type3]; auto.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam.
    replace (T1 :: G ++ [U]) with ((T1 :: G) ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    replace (S (length G)) with (length (T1 :: G)) by reflexivity.
    apply IHhas_type.
    apply shift_typing. auto.
  - (* T_App *)
    apply T_App; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2]; auto.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    apply T_Fix.
    replace (T0 :: G ++ [U]) with ((T0 :: G) ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    replace (S (length G)) with (length (T0 :: G)) by reflexivity.
    apply IHhas_type.
    apply shift_typing. auto.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHhas_type. auto.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHhas_type. auto.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    apply T_Assign; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2]; auto.
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_typing_empty : forall S_ty s t T U,
  has_type [U] S_ty t T ->
  has_type [] S_ty s U ->
  has_type [] S_ty (subst 0 s t) T.
Proof.
  intros S_ty s t T U Ht Hs.
  apply subst_preserves_typing with (G := [] : ctx) (U := U); auto.
Qed.

(** ** Heap Lemmas *)

Lemma heap_lookup_ok : forall mu S_ty l v,
  heap_ok mu S_ty ->
  heap_lookup l mu = Some v ->
  exists T, nth_error S_ty l = Some T /\ has_type [] S_ty v T.
Proof.
  induction mu as [|[l' v'] mu']; intros S_ty l v Hok Hlook; simpl in *.
  - inversion Hlook.
  - destruct (Nat.eqb_spec l l').
    + subst. inversion Hok; subst. injection Hlook; intros; subst.
      exists T. auto.
    + inversion Hok; subst.
      apply IHmu' with (S_ty := S_ty) (l := l) (v := v); auto.
      destruct (Nat.eqb l l') eqn:Heq; [contradiction | auto].
Qed.

Lemma length_heap_update : forall mu l v,
  length (heap_update l v mu) = length mu.
Proof.
  induction mu as [|[l' v'] mu']; intros; simpl.
  - auto.
  - destruct (Nat.eqb_spec l l'); subst; simpl; auto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_update_ok : forall mu S_ty l v T,
  heap_ok mu S_ty ->
  nth_error S_ty l = Some T ->
  has_type [] S_ty v T ->
  heap_ok (heap_update l v mu) S_ty.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros Hnth Hv; simpl.
  - apply heap_empty.
  - destruct (Nat.eqb_spec l0 l).
    + subst. injection H1; intros; subst.
      apply heap_cons with (T := T0); auto.
      apply IHheap_ok; auto.
    + apply heap_cons with (T := T0); auto.
      apply IHheap_ok; auto.
Qed.

(** ** Main Preservation Theorem *)

Lemma preservation_lemma : forall t mu t' mu',
  step t mu t' mu' ->
  forall S_ty T,
  has_type [] S_ty t T ->
  heap_ok mu S_ty ->
  length mu >= length S_ty ->
  exists S_ty',
    extends S_ty' S_ty /\
    heap_ok mu' S_ty' /\
    has_type [] S_ty' t' T /\
    length mu' >= length S_ty'.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros S_ty T Ht Hok Hlen.
  - (* S_Succ *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty TyNat H2 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Succ; auto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_PredZero *)
    inversion Ht; subst. inversion H3; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Num.
    + auto.
  - (* S_PredSucc *)
    inversion Ht; subst. inversion H3; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Num.
    + auto.
  - (* S_Pred *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty TyNat H2 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Pred; auto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_IsZeroZero *)
    inversion Ht; subst. inversion H3; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Bool.
    + auto.
  - (* S_IsZeroSucc *)
    inversion Ht; subst. inversion H3; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Bool.
    + auto.
  - (* S_IsZero *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty TyNat H2 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_IsZero; auto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_IfTrue *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split; auto.
  - (* S_IfFalse *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split; auto.
  - (* S_If *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty TyBool H2 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_If; auto; eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_App1 *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty (TyArrow T1 T) H2 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_App with (T1 := T1); auto. eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_App2 *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty T1 H4 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_App with (T1 := T1); auto. eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_AppAbs *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    inversion H2; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split.
    + eapply subst0_typing_empty; eauto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_Fix *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split.
    + eapply subst0_typing_empty with (U := T); eauto.
      apply H2.
    + auto.
  - (* S_Ref *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty T0 H2 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Ref; auto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_RefV *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    set (S_ty' := store_extend S_ty (length mu) T0).
    exists S_ty'. split.
    { apply store_extend_extends. }
    split.
    { apply heap_cons with (T := T0).
      - apply heap_ok_extends with (S_ty := S_ty); auto. apply store_extend_extends.
      - eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto. apply store_extend_extends.
      - apply nth_error_store_extend. auto. }
    split.
    { apply T_Loc. apply nth_error_store_extend. auto. }
    { simpl. rewrite length_store_extend. lia. }
  - (* S_Deref *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty (TyRef T) H2 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Deref; auto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_DerefLoc *)
    inversion Ht; subst. inversion H2; subst.
    destruct (heap_lookup_ok mu S_ty l v Hok H4) as [T' [Hnth Hv]].
    rewrite Hnth in H3. injection H3; intros; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split; auto. split; auto.
  - (* S_Assign1 *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty (TyRef T) H2 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Assign with (T := T); auto. eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_Assign2 *)
    inversion Ht; subst. inversion H2; subst.
    destruct (IHstep S_ty T0 H6 Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' Hlen']]]].
    exists S_ty'. split; auto. split; auto. split.
    + apply T_Assign with (T := T0); auto. eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto.
    + auto.
  - (* S_AssignV *)
    inversion Ht; subst. inversion H2; subst.
    exists S_ty. split; [apply extends_refl |]. split.
    + apply heap_update_ok with (T := T); auto.
    + split.
      * apply T_Num.
      * rewrite length_heap_update. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs
     For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
     Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall t mu t' mu' T S_ty,
    has_type [] S_ty t T ->
    step t mu t' mu' ->
    heap_ok mu S_ty ->
    length mu >= length S_ty ->
    exists S_ty',
      extends S_ty' S_ty /\
      heap_ok mu' S_ty' /\
      has_type [] S_ty' t' T.
Proof.
  intros t mu t' mu' T S_ty Ht Hstep Hok Hlen.
  destruct (preservation_lemma t mu t' mu' Hstep S_ty T Ht Hok Hlen) as [S_ty' [Hext [Hok' [Ht' _]]]].
  exists S_ty'. auto.
Qed.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall t mu t' mu' T S_ty,
    has_type [] S_ty t T ->
    step t mu t' mu' ->
    heap_ok mu S_ty ->
    length mu >= length S_ty ->
    exists S_ty',
      extends S_ty' S_ty /\
      heap_ok mu' S_ty' /\
      has_type [] S_ty' t' T).
Proof.
Admitted.

metadata.preview:
Lemma heap_ok_extends : forall mu S_ty S_ty2,
  heap_ok mu S_ty ->
  extends S_ty2 S_ty ->
  heap_ok mu S_ty2.
Proof.
  intros mu S_ty S_ty2 Hok Hext.
  revert S_ty2 Hext.
  induction Hok; intros S_ty2 Hext.
  - apply heap_empty.
  - apply heap_cons with (T := T); auto.
    + apply IHheap_ok; auto.
    + eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto.
    + eapply nth_error_extends; eauto.
Qed.

display.text:
Lemma heap_ok_extends : forall mu S_ty S_ty2,
  heap_ok mu S_ty ->

Proof.
  intros mu S_ty S_ty2 Hok Hext.
  revert S_ty2 Hext.
  induction Hok; intros S_ty2 Hext.
  - apply heap_empty.
  - apply heap_cons with (T := T); auto.
    + apply IHheap_ok; auto.
    + eapply has_type_weakening_store; eauto.
    + eapply nth_error_extends; eauto.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma length_store_extend : forall S_ty n T,
  n >= length S_ty ->
  length (store_extend S_ty n T) = S n.
Proof.
  intros S_ty n T Hge. unfold store_extend.
  rewrite !app_length. simpl.
  rewrite length_replicate_ty.
  assert (length S_ty + (n - length S_ty) = n) by lia.
  rewrite H. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

  rewrite app_length. simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl.
  rewrite length_replicate_ty. lia.
Qed.

(** ** Shift Lemma *)

Lemma nth_error_shift_lt : forall (A : Type) (G1 G2 : list A) (U : A) x T,
  x < length G1 ->
  nth_error (G1 ++ G2) x = Some T ->
  nth_error (G1 ++ U :: G2) x = Some T.
Proof.
  induction G1 as [|a G1]; intros G2 U x T Hlt Hnth; simpl in *.
  - lia.
  - destruct x; simpl in *.
    + auto.
    + apply IHG1 with (G2 := G2) (U := U); lia || auto.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_shift_ge : forall (A : Type) (G1 G2 : list A) (U : A) x T,
  x >= length G1 ->
  nth_error (G1 ++ G2) x = Some T ->
  nth_error (G1 ++ U :: G2) (x + 1) = Some T.
Proof.
  induction G1 as [|a G1]; intros G2 U x T Hge Hnth; simpl in *.
  - rewrite Nat.add_1_r. auto.
  - destruct x; simpl in *.
    + inversion Hge.
    + apply IHG1 with (G2 := G2) (U := U); lia || auto.
Qed.

Lemma shift_at_typing : forall G1 G2 S_ty t T U,
  has_type (G1 ++ G2) S_ty t T ->
  has_type (G1 ++ U :: G2) S_ty (shift_at (length G1) t) T.
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl.
  - (* T_Var *)
    destruct (Nat.ltb_spec x (length G1)).
    + apply T_Var. eapply nth_error_shift_lt; eauto.
    + apply T_Var. eapply nth_error_shift_ge; eauto.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2 | apply IHhas_type3].
  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam.
    replace (S (length G1)) with (length (T1 :: G1)) by reflexivity.
    replace (T1 :: G1 ++ U :: G2) with ((T1 :: G1) ++ U :: G2) by reflexivity.
    apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_App *)
    apply T_App; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2].
  - (* T_Fix *)
    apply T_Fix.
    replace (S (length G1)) with (length (T :: G1)) by reflexivity.
    replace (T :: G1 ++ U :: G2) with ((T :: G1) ++ U :: G2) by reflexivity.
    apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHhas_type.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    apply T_Assign; [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2].
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_shift_ge : forall (A : Type) (G1 G2 : list A) (U : A) x T,
  x >= length G1 ->
  nth_error (G1 ++ G2) x = Some T ->
  nth_error (G1 ++ U :: G2) (x + 1) = Some T.
Proof.
  induction G1 as [|a G1]; intros G2 U x T Hge Hnth; simpl in *.
  - rewrite Nat.add_1_r. auto.
  - destruct x; simpl in *.
    + inversion Hge.
    + apply IHG1 with (G2 := G2) (U := U); lia || auto.

  nth_error (G1 ++ G2) x = Some T ->
  has_type (G1 ++ U :: G2) S_ty (shift_at (length G1) (Var x)) T.

  has_type (G1 ++ G2) S_ty t T ->
  has_type (G1 ++ U :: G2) S_ty (shift_at (length G1) t) T.
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl.

  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam.
    replace (S (length G1)) with (length (T1 :: G1)) by reflexivity.
    replace (T1 :: G1 ++ U :: G2) with ((T1 :: G1) ++ U :: G2) by reflexivity.
    apply IHhas_type.

  - (* T_Assign *)

  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma shift_at_typing_Var : forall G1 G2 S_ty x T U,
  nth_error (G1 ++ G2) x = Some T ->
  has_type (G1 ++ U :: G2) S_ty (shift_at (length G1) (Var x)) T.
Proof.
  intros G1 G2 S_ty x T U H.
  unfold shift_at.
  destruct (Nat.ltb x (length G1)) eqn:Heq; simpl.
  - apply T_Var. eapply nth_error_shift_lt; eauto. apply Nat.ltb_lt; auto.
  - apply T_Var.
    revert x H Heq.
    induction G1 as [|a G1]; intros x H Heq; simpl in *.
    + rewrite Nat.add_1_r. exact H.
    + destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (S (length G1)) x).
      * (* x >= S (length G1), i.e., x > length G1 *)
        destruct x; simpl in *.
        { inversion l. }
        { apply IHG1; simpl; auto.
          - simpl in H. exact H.
          - simpl in Heq. exact Heq. }
      * (* x < S (length G1) *)
        exfalso.
        assert (x <= length G1) by lia.
        apply Nat.ltb_lt in H0. rewrite H0 in Heq. discriminate.
Qed.

Proof.

Lemma shift_typing : forall G S_ty t T U,
  has_type G S_ty t T ->
  has_type (U :: G) S_ty (shift t) T.
Proof.
  intros G S_ty t T U H.
  unfold shift.
  replace (U :: G) with (([] : ctx) ++ U :: G) by reflexivity.
  replace G with (([] : ctx) ++ G) by reflexivity.
  apply shift_at_typing with (G1 := [] : ctx) (G2 := G); auto.
Qed.

(** ** Substitution Lemma *)

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall G S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (G ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type G S_ty s U ->
  has_type G S_ty (subst (length G) s t) T.
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl; intros Hs.
  - (* T_Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length G)).
    + (* x = length G *)
      subst.
      apply nth_error_app_right with (n := 0) in H. simpl in H. inversion H; subst.

(** ** Substitution Lemma *)

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall G S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (G ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type G S_ty s U ->
  has_type G S_ty (subst (length G) s t) T.
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl; intros Hs.
  - (* T_Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length G)).
    + (* x = length G *)
      subst.
      apply nth_error_app_right with (n := 0) in H. simpl in H. inversion H; subst.
      auto.
    + (* x <> length G *)
      apply T_Var.
      assert (x < length G \/ x > length G) as [Hlt | Hgt] by lia.
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H. auto.
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H.
        exfalso. apply nth_error_Some in H. lia.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHHt. auto.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHHt. auto.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt. auto.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If; [apply IHHt1 | apply IHHt2 | apply IHHt3]; auto.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    eapply T_Lam.
    replace (T1 :: G ++ [U]) with ((T1 :: G) ++ [U]) by reflexivity.

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall G S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (G ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type G S_ty s U ->
  has_type G S_ty (subst (length G) s t) T.
Proof.

input.newString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall G S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (G ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type G S_ty s U ->
  has_type G S_ty (subst (length G) s t) T.
Proof.
  induction t; intros G S_ty s T U Ht Hs; inversion Ht; subst; simpl;
    try solve [apply T_Num | apply T_Bool | apply T_Loc; auto].
  - (* Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec n (length G)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H1. inversion H1; subst. auto.
    + apply T_Var.
      destruct (Nat.ltb_spec n (length G)).
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H1. auto.
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H1.
        exfalso. apply nth_error_Some in H1. lia.
  - (* Succ *)
    apply T_Succ. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Pred *)
    apply T_Pred. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* IsZero *)
    apply T_IsZero. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* If *)

    replace (T1 :: G ++ [U]) with ((T1 :: G) ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    eapply IHt; eauto.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* App *)
    eapply T_App; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2]; eauto.

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall G S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (G ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type G S_ty s U ->
  has_type G S_ty (subst (length G) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros G S_ty s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (G ++ [U]) as Gfull eqn:HeqG.
  revert G U s Hs HeqG.
  induction Ht; intros G U s Hs HeqG; subst Gfull; simpl.
  - (* T_Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length G)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H. inversion H; subst. auto.
    + apply T_Var.
      assert (x < length G \/ x > length G) as [Hlt | Hgt] by lia.
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H. auto.
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H.
        exfalso. apply nth_error_Some in H. lia.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (U := U) (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (U := U) (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (U := U) (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If;
      [apply IHHt1 with (U := U) (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (U := U) (s := s)
      | apply IHHt3 with (U := U) (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    eapply T_Lam.
    replace (T1 :: G ++ [U]) with ((T1 :: G) ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    replace (S (length G)) with (length (T1 :: G)) by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (U := U) (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_App *)
    eapply T_App;
      [apply IHHt1 with (U := U) (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (U := U) (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    eapply T_Fix.
    replace (T0 :: G ++ [U]) with ((T0 :: G) ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    replace (S (length G)) with (length (T0 :: G)) by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (U := U) (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (U := U) (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (U := U) (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign;
      [apply IHHt1 with (U := U) (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (U := U) (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall S_ty s t T U,
  has_type [U] S_ty t T ->
  has_type [] S_ty s U ->
  has_type [] S_ty (subst 0 s t) T.
Proof.
  intros S_ty s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember [U] as G eqn:HeqG.
  revert s Hs HeqG.
  induction Ht; intros s Hs HeqG; subst G; simpl.
  - (* T_Var *)
    inversion HeqG. subst. clear HeqG.
    destruct x; simpl in H; try solve [inversion H].
    inversion H; subst. auto.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt3 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    replace (T1 :: [])%list with [T1] by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_App *)
    eapply T_App;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T).
    replace (T :: [])%list with [T] by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type Gamma S_ty s U ->
  has_type Gamma S_ty (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma S_ty s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma s Hs Heq.
  induction Ht; intros Gamma' s Hs Heq.
  - (* T_Var *)
    subst GammaU. simpl.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma')).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H. inversion H; subst. auto.
    + apply T_Var.
      destruct (Nat.ltb_spec x (length Gamma')).
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H. auto.
      * apply nth_error_app_left with (l2 := [U]) in H.
        exfalso. apply nth_error_Some in H. lia.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt3 with (s := s)]; auto; subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    simpl.
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    match goal with
    | [ H : ?G = ?G' ++ [?U] |- _ ] => rewrite H
    end.
    replace (S (length Gamma')) with (length (T1 :: Gamma')) by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_App *)
    simpl.
    eapply T_App;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    simpl.
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    match goal with
    | [ H : ?G = ?G' ++ [?U] |- _ ] => rewrite H
    end.
    replace (S (length Gamma')) with (length (T0 :: Gamma')) by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    simpl.
    eapply T_Assign;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; subst; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Loc *) simpl. apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall S_ty s t T U,
  has_type [U] S_ty t T ->
  has_type [] S_ty s U ->
  has_type [] S_ty (subst 0 s t) T.
Proof.
  intros S_ty s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember [U] as G eqn:HeqG.
  revert s Hs HeqG.
  induction Ht; intros s Hs HeqG; subst G; simpl.
  - (* T_Var *)
    inversion HeqG. subst. clear HeqG.
    destruct x; simpl in H; try solve [inversion H].
    inversion H; subst. auto.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt3 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    replace (T1 :: [])%list with [T1] by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_App *)
    eapply T_App;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T).
    replace (T :: [])%list with [T] by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_app_left_inv : forall (A : Type) (l1 l2 : list A) (n : nat) (x : A),
  n < length l1 ->
  nth_error (l1 ++ l2) n = Some x ->
  nth_error l1 n = Some x.
Proof.
  induction l1; intros; simpl in *.
  - lia.
  - destruct n; simpl in *; auto.
    apply IHl1; auto. lia.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma subst0_typing : forall S_ty s t T U,
  has_type [U] S_ty t T ->
  has_type [] S_ty s U ->
  has_type [] S_ty (subst 0 s t) T.
Proof.
  induction t; intros S_ty s T U Ht Hs; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    destruct n; simpl in *.
    + inversion H1; subst. auto.
    + inversion H1.
  - (* Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *) apply T_Succ. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Pred *) apply T_Pred. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* If *)
    apply T_If; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2 | eapply IHt3]; eauto.
  - (* Lam *)
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    apply IHt with (U := U).
    simpl. exact H5.
    apply shift_typing with (U := T1); auto.
  - (* App *)
    eapply T_App; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2]; eauto.
  - (* Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    apply IHt with (U := U).
    simpl. exact H4.
    apply shift_typing with (U := T0); auto.
  - (* Ref *) apply T_Ref. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Deref *) apply T_Deref. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2]; eauto.
  - (* Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type Gamma S_ty s U ->
  has_type Gamma S_ty (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma S_ty s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma s Hs Heq.
  induction Ht; intros GammaU1 Gamma1 s1 Hs1 Heq1.
  - (* T_Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma')).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H. inversion H; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma') x).
      * exfalso.
        assert (x > length Gamma') by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma' ++ [U]) x = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H. inversion H.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H; auto.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt3 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    replace (T1 :: Gamma' ++ [U]) with ((T1 :: Gamma') ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    replace (S (length Gamma')) with (length (T1 :: Gamma')) by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_App *)
    eapply T_App;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    replace (T0 :: Gamma' ++ [U]) with ((T0 :: Gamma') ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    replace (S (length Gamma')) with (length (T0 :: Gamma')) by reflexivity.
    apply IHHt with (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall ST s t T U,
  has_type [U] ST t T ->
  has_type [] ST s U ->
  has_type [] ST (subst 0 s t) T.
Proof.
  induction t; intros ST s T U Ht Hs; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    destruct n; simpl in *.
    + inversion H1; subst. auto.
    + inversion H1.
  - (* Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *) apply T_Succ. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Pred *) apply T_Pred. eapply IHt; eauto.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall S_ty s t T U,
  has_type [U] S_ty t T ->
  has_type [] S_ty s U ->
  has_type [] S_ty (subst 0 s t) T.
Proof.
  induction t; intros S_ty s T U Ht Hs; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)

  - (* Lam *)

    apply IHt with (U := U).
    simpl. exact H5.
    apply shift_typing with (U := T1); auto.
  - (* App *)
    eapply T_App; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2]; eauto.
  - (* Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    apply IHt with (U := U).
    simpl. exact H4.
    apply shift_typing with (U := T0); auto.
  - (* Ref *) apply T_Ref. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Deref *) apply T_Deref. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2]; eauto.
  - (* Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

From Stdlib Require Import List.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive ty : Type := TyNat.

Inductive tm : Type := Var : nat -> tm | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm.

Definition ctx := list ty.

Inductive has_type : ctx -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G (Var x) T
  | T_Lam : forall G T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) t T2 -> has_type G (Lam T1 t) T2.

Lemma test : forall Gamma t T, has_type Gamma t T -> True.
Proof.
  intros Gamma t T Ht.
  remember Gamma as G eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma Heq.
  induction Ht; intros Gamma Heq; subst G.
  - exact I.
  - exact I.
Qed.
EOF

part.text: Let me rewrite `subst_preserves_typing` using induction on `t`:

input.newString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall G S_ty s t T U,
  has_type (G ++ [U]) S_ty t T ->
  has_type G S_ty s U ->
  has_type G S_ty (subst (length G) s t) T.
Proof.
  induction t as [n| | |t1 IHt1|t2 IHt2|t3 IHt3|t1 IHt1 t2 IHt2 t3 IHt3|
                  T1 t IHt|t1 IHt1 t2 IHt2|t IHt|
                  t IHt|t IHt|t1 IHt1 t2 IHt2|];
    intros G S_ty s T U Ht Hs; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec n (length G)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H1. inversion H1; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length G) n).
      * exfalso.
        assert (n > length G) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (G ++ [U]) n = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H1. inversion H1.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H1; auto.
  - (* Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *) apply T_Succ. eapply IHt1; eauto.
  - (* Pred *) apply T_Pred. eapply IHt2; eauto.
  - (* IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. eapply IHt3; eauto.
  - (* If *)

input.newString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma ST s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
  pattern t.
  refine (has_type_ind _ _ _ _ _).
  - (* T_Var *)
    intros G S x T0 Hnth Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq; subst. simpl.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in Hnth. inversion Hnth; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) x).
      * exfalso.
        assert (x > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) x = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in Hnth. inversion Hnth.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in Hnth; auto.
  - (* T_Num *) intros. apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) intros. apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_Succ. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Pred *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_Pred. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_IsZero *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_IsZero. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_If *)
    intros G S t1 t2 t3 T0 H1 IH1 H2 IH2 H3 IH3 Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    apply T_If; [apply IH1 with (s := s) | apply IH2 with (s := s) | apply IH3 with (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    intros G S T1 T2 t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    simpl.
    apply IH with (s := shift s) (Gamma := T1 :: Gamma); auto.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* T_App *)
    intros G S t1 t2 T1 T2 H1 IH1 H2 IH2 Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    eapply T_App; [apply IH1 with (s := s) | apply IH2 with (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    intros G S t0 T0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    simpl.
    apply IH with (s := shift s) (Gamma := T0 :: Gamma); auto.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* T_Ref *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_Ref. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Deref *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_Deref. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    intros G S t1 t2 T0 H1 IH1 H2 IH2 Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    eapply T_Assign; [apply IH1 with (s := s) | apply IH2 with (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Loc *) intros. apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma ST s t T U Ht Hs.
  generalize dependent Hs.
  generalize dependent Ht.
  induction t as [n| | |t1 IHt1|t2 IHt2|t3 IHt3|t1 IHt1 t2 IHt2 t3 IHt3|
                  T1 t IHt|t1 IHt1 t2 IHt2|t IHt|
                  t IHt|t IHt|t1 IHt1 t2 IHt2|];
    intros Ht Hs; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    inversion Ht; inversion Hs; subst. simpl.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec n (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H1. inversion H1; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) n).
      * exfalso.
        assert (n > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H1. inversion H1.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H1; auto.
  - (* Num *) inversion Ht; subst; apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) inversion Ht; subst; apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *) inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Succ. eapply IHt1; eauto.
  - (* Pred *) inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Pred. eapply IHt2; eauto.
  - (* IsZero *) inversion Ht; subst. apply T_IsZero. eapply IHt3; eauto.
  - (* If *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    apply T_If; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2 | eapply IHt3]; eauto.
  - (* Lam *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    replace (S (length Gamma)) with (length (T1 :: Gamma)) by reflexivity.
    replace (T1 :: Gamma ++ [U]) with ((T1 :: Gamma) ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    apply IHt with (U := U); auto.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* App *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    eapply T_App; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2]; eauto.
  - (* Fix *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    replace (S (length Gamma)) with (length (T0 :: Gamma)) by reflexivity.
    replace (T0 :: Gamma ++ [U]) with ((T0 :: Gamma) ++ [U]) by reflexivity.
    apply IHt with (U := U); auto.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* Ref *) inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Ref. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Deref *) inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Deref. eapply IHt; eauto.
  - (* Assign *)
    inversion Ht; subst.
    eapply T_Assign; [eapply IHt1 | eapply IHt2]; eauto.
  - (* Loc *) inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma ST s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
  pattern t.
  refine (has_type_ind _ _ _ _ _).
  - (* T_Var *)
    intros G S x T0 Hnth Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq; subst. simpl.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in Hnth. inversion Hnth; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) x).
      * exfalso.
        assert (x > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) x = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in Hnth. inversion Hnth.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in Hnth; auto.
  - (* T_Num *) intros. apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) intros. apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_Succ. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Pred *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_Pred. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_IsZero *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_IsZero. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_If *)
    intros G S t1 t2 t3 T0 H1 IH1 H2 IH2 H3 IH3 Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    apply T_If; [apply IH1 with (s := s) | apply IH2 with (s := s) | apply IH3 with (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    intros G S T1 T2 t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    simpl.
    apply IH with (s := shift s) (Gamma := T1 :: Gamma); auto.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* T_App *)
    intros G S t1 t2 T1 T2 H1 IH1 H2 IH2 Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    eapply T_App; [apply IH1 with (s := s) | apply IH2 with (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    intros G S t0 T0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    simpl.
    apply IH with (s := shift s) (Gamma := T0 :: Gamma); auto.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* T_Ref *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_Ref. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Deref *)
    intros G S t0 Ht0 IH Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl. apply T_Deref. apply IH with (s := s); auto.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    intros G S t1 t2 T0 H1 IH1 H2 IH2 Gamma ST s T U Hs Heq.
    inversion Heq. subst. simpl.
    eapply T_Assign; [apply IH1 with (s := s) | apply IH2 with (s := s)]; auto.
  - (* T_Loc *) intros. apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma ST s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma s Hs Heq.
  induction Ht; intros Gamma s Hs Heq; subst GammaU; simpl.
  - (* T_Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H. inversion H; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) x).
      * exfalso.
        assert (x > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) x = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H. inversion H.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H; auto.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt3 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma := T1 :: Gamma) (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_App *)
    eapply T_App;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma := T0 :: Gamma) (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.

input.command:
cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782161083_NBUUhr && cat > /tmp/test_ind.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import List.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type := Var : nat -> tm | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.

Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2.

Lemma test : forall (ST : store_ty) (Gamma : ctx) (s : tm) (U : ty) (t : tm) (T : ty),
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  True.
Proof.
  intros ST Gamma s U t T Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma s Hs Heq.
  induction Ht; intros Gamma s Hs Heq; subst GammaU.
  - exact I.
  - apply IHHt with (s := s); [exact Hs | reflexivity].
  - apply IHHt1 with (s := s); [exact Hs | reflexivity].
    apply IHHt2 with (s := s); [exact Hs | reflexivity].
Qed.
EOF

input.newString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma ST s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma s.
  induction Ht; intros Gamma' s'.
  - (* T_Var *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma')).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H. inversion H; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma') x).
      * exfalso.
        assert (x > length Gamma') by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma' ++ [U]) x = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H. inversion H.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H; auto.
  - (* T_Num *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl. apply T_Succ.
    apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Pred *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl. apply T_Pred.
    apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_IsZero *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl. apply T_IsZero.
    apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_If *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl.
    apply T_If;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s' := s')
      | apply IHHt2 with (s' := s')
      | apply IHHt3 with (s' := s')]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl.
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma' := T1 :: Gamma') (s' := shift s').
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    simpl. f_equal. auto.
  - (* T_App *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl.
    eapply T_App;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s' := s')
      | apply IHHt2 with (s' := s')]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl.
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma' := T0 :: Gamma') (s' := shift s').
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    simpl. f_equal. auto.
  - (* T_Ref *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl. apply T_Ref.
    apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Deref *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl. apply T_Deref.
    apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl.
    eapply T_Assign;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s' := s')
      | apply IHHt2 with (s' := s')]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Loc *)
    intros Hs' Heq'. subst GammaU. simpl. apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma ST s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma s Hs Heq.
  induction Ht using has_type_ind; intros Gamma s Hs Heq; simpl.
  - (* T_Var *)
    rewrite Heq in H.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H. inversion H; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) x).
      * exfalso.
        assert (x > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) x = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H. inversion H.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H; auto.
  - (* T_Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *) apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Pred *) apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_If *)
    apply T_If;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt3 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma := T1 :: Gamma) (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_App *)
    eapply T_App;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma := T0 :: Gamma) (s := shift s).
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* T_Ref *) apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Deref *) apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (s := s); auto. reflexivity.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign;
      [apply IHHt1 with (s := s)
      | apply IHHt2 with (s := s)]; auto; reflexivity.
  - (* T_Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma ST s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma s Heq.
  induction Ht; intros Gamma' s' Heq'.
  - (* T_Var *)
    simpl. rewrite <- Heq'.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma')).

    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma') x).
      * exfalso.
        assert (x > length Gamma') by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma' ++ [U]) x = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H. inversion H.
      * apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H; auto.
  - (* T_Num *) simpl. apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) simpl. apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *)
    simpl. apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_Pred *)
    simpl. apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_IsZero *)
    simpl. apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_If *)
    simpl. apply T_If; [apply IHHt1 with (s' := s') | apply IHHt2 with (s' := s') | apply IHHt3 with (s' := s')]; auto.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    simpl. apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma' := T1 :: Gamma') (s' := shift s').
    simpl. f_equal. auto.
  - (* T_App *)
    simpl. eapply T_App; [apply IHHt1 with (s' := s') | apply IHHt2 with (s' := s')]; auto.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    simpl. apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma' := T0 :: Gamma') (s' := shift s').

  - (* T_Ref *) simpl. apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_Deref *) simpl. apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_Assign *)

input.newString:
Fixpoint subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t T U
  (Ht : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T)
  (Hs : has_type Gamma ST s U) {struct t} :
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  destruct t; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec n (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H1. inversion H1; subst. exact Hs.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) n) as [Hle | Hlt].
      { exfalso.
        assert (n > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H1. inversion H1. }
      { apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H1; auto. }
  - (* Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *) apply T_Succ. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* Pred *) apply T_Pred. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* If *)
    apply T_If; [eapply subst_preserves_typing | eapply subst_preserves_typing | eapply subst_preserves_typing]; eauto.
  - (* Lam *)
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    eapply subst_preserves_typing with (Gamma := T1 :: Gamma) (s := shift s).
    simpl. exact H5.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* App *)
    eapply T_App; [eapply subst_preserves_typing | eapply subst_preserves_typing]; eauto.
  - (* Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    eapply subst_preserves_typing with (Gamma := T0 :: Gamma) (s := shift s).
    simpl. exact H4.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* Ref *) apply T_Ref. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* Deref *) apply T_Deref. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign; [eapply subst_preserves_typing | eapply subst_preserves_typing]; eauto.
  - (* Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  intros Gamma ST s t T U Ht Hs.
  remember (Gamma ++ [U]) as GammaU eqn:Heq.
  revert Gamma s Hs Heq.
  induction Ht; intros Gamma' s' Hs' Heq'.
  - (* T_Var *)
    simpl. rewrite Heq' in H.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec x (length Gamma')).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H. inversion H; subst. auto.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma') x) as [Hle | Hlt].
      { exfalso.
        assert (x > length Gamma') by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma' ++ [U]) x = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H. inversion H. }
      { apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H; auto. }
  - (* T_Num *) simpl. apply T_Num.
  - (* T_Bool *) simpl. apply T_Bool.
  - (* T_Succ *)
    simpl. apply T_Succ. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_Pred *)
    simpl. apply T_Pred. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_IsZero *)
    simpl. apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_If *)
    simpl. apply T_If; [apply IHHt1 with (s' := s') | apply IHHt2 with (s' := s') | apply IHHt3 with (s' := s')]; auto.
  - (* T_Lam *)
    simpl. apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma' := T1 :: Gamma') (s' := shift s').
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    simpl. f_equal. auto.
  - (* T_App *)
    simpl. eapply T_App; [apply IHHt1 with (s' := s') | apply IHHt2 with (s' := s')]; auto.
  - (* T_Fix *)
    simpl. apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    apply IHHt with (Gamma' := T0 :: Gamma') (s' := shift s').
    apply shift_typing; auto.
    simpl. f_equal. auto.
  - (* T_Ref *) simpl. apply T_Ref. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_Deref *) simpl. apply T_Deref. apply IHHt with (s' := s'); auto.
  - (* T_Assign *)
    simpl. eapply T_Assign; [apply IHHt1 with (s' := s') | apply IHHt2 with (s' := s')]; auto.
  - (* T_Loc *) simpl. apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

From Stdlib Require Import List.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type := Var : nat -> tm | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2.

Goal forall Gamma ST s t T U, has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST (Lam TyNat t) T -> True.
Proof.
  intros. destruct t. inversion H. subst.
  Show.
Abort.
EOF
coqc -Q . "" /tmp/test_inv.v 2>&1

input.newString:
Fixpoint subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t T U
  (Ht : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T)
  (Hs : has_type Gamma ST s U) {struct t} :
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  destruct t; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    match goal with H : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = Some T |- _ => rename H into Hnth end.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec n (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in Hnth. inversion Hnth; subst. exact Hs.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) n) as [Hle | Hlt].
      { exfalso.
        assert (n > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in Hnth. inversion Hnth. }
      { apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in Hnth; auto. }
  - (* Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_Succ; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t1 TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* Pred *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_Pred; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t2 TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* IsZero *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t3 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_IsZero; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t3 TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* If *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1_0 TyBool,
      H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2_0 ?T0,
      H3_0 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t3_0 ?T0 |- _ =>
      apply T_If; [eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t1_0 TyBool U H1 Hs) | eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t2_0 T0 U H2 Hs) | eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t3_0 T0 U H3_0 Hs)]
    end.
  - (* Lam *)
    match goal with Hlam : has_type (T1 :: Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T2 |- _ =>
      apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2);
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing (T1 :: Gamma) ST (shift s) t T2 U); [exact Hlam | apply shift_typing; auto]
    end.
  - (* App *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1_0 (TyArrow ?T1 ?T2), H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2_0 ?T1 |- _ =>
      eapply T_App; [eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t1_0 (TyArrow T1 T2) U H1 Hs) | eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t2_0 T1 U H2 Hs)]
    end.
  - (* Fix *)
    match goal with Hfix : has_type (T0 :: Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T0 |- _ =>
      apply T_Fix with (T := T0);
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing (T0 :: Gamma) ST (shift s) t T0 U); [exact Hfix | apply shift_typing; auto]
    end.
  - (* Ref *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t ?T0 |- _ =>
      apply T_Ref; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t T0 U H Hs)
    end.
  - (* Deref *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t (TyRef ?T0) |- _ =>
      apply T_Deref; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t (TyRef T0) U H Hs)
    end.
  - (* Assign *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1_0 (TyRef ?T0), H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2_0 ?T0 |- _ =>
      eapply T_Assign; [eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t1_0 (TyRef T0) U H1 Hs) | eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t2_0 T0 U H2 Hs)]
    end.
  - (* Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Fixpoint subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t T U
  (Ht : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T)
  (Hs : has_type Gamma ST s U) {struct t} :
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  destruct t; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec n (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in H. inversion H; subst. exact Hs.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) n) as [Hle | Hlt].
      { exfalso.
        assert (n > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in H. inversion H. }
      { apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in H; auto. }
  - (* Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *) apply T_Succ. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* Pred *) apply T_Pred. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* IsZero *) apply T_IsZero. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* If *)
    apply T_If; [eapply subst_preserves_typing | eapply subst_preserves_typing | eapply subst_preserves_typing]; eauto.
  - (* Lam *)
    apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
    eapply subst_preserves_typing with (Gamma := T1 :: Gamma) (s := shift s).
    simpl. exact H.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* App *)
    eapply T_App; [eapply subst_preserves_typing | eapply subst_preserves_typing]; eauto.
  - (* Fix *)
    apply T_Fix with (T := T0).
    eapply subst_preserves_typing with (Gamma := T0 :: Gamma) (s := shift s).
    simpl. exact H.
    apply shift_typing; auto.
  - (* Ref *) apply T_Ref. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* Deref *) apply T_Deref. eapply subst_preserves_typing; eauto.
  - (* Assign *)
    eapply T_Assign; [eapply subst_preserves_typing | eapply subst_preserves_typing]; eauto.
  - (* Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma subst_preserves_typing : forall Gamma ST s t T U,
  has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T ->
  has_type Gamma ST s U ->
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  induction t; intros Gamma ST s T U Ht Hs; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    match goal with H : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = Some T |- _ => rename H into Hnth end.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec n (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in Hnth. inversion Hnth; subst. exact Hs.
    + intro Hneq. apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) n) as [Hle | Hlt].
      { exfalso. assert (n > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in Hnth. inversion Hnth. }
      { apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in Hnth; auto. }
  - (* Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_Succ; apply (IHt1 Gamma ST s TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* Pred *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_Pred; apply (IHt2 Gamma ST s TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* IsZero *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t3 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_IsZero; apply (IHt3 Gamma ST s TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* If *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST ?tt1 TyBool,
      H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST ?tt2 ?TT,
      H3 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST ?tt3 ?TT |- _ =>
      apply T_If; [apply (IHt1 Gamma ST s TyBool U H1 Hs) | apply (IHt2 Gamma ST s TT U H2 Hs) | apply (IHt3 Gamma ST s TT U H3 Hs)]
    end.
  - (* Lam *)
    match goal with H : has_type (T1 :: Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T2 |- _ =>
      apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2);
      apply (IHt (T1 :: Gamma) ST (shift s) T2 U H);
      apply shift_typing; auto
    end.
  - (* App *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1 (TyArrow ?T1 ?T2),
      H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2 ?T1 |- _ =>
      eapply T_App; [apply (IHt1 Gamma ST s (TyArrow T1 T2) U H1 Hs) | apply (IHt2 Gamma ST s T1 U H2 Hs)]
    end.
  - (* Fix *)
    match goal with H : has_type (T0 :: Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T0 |- _ =>
      apply T_Fix with (T := T0);
      apply (IHt (T0 :: Gamma) ST (shift s) T0 U H);
      apply shift_typing; auto
    end.
  - (* Ref *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t ?T0 |- _ =>
      apply T_Ref; apply (IHt Gamma ST s T0 U H Hs) end.
  - (* Deref *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t (TyRef ?T0) |- _ =>
      apply T_Deref; apply (IHt Gamma ST s (TyRef T0) U H Hs) end.
  - (* Assign *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1 (TyRef ?T0),
      H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2 ?T0 |- _ =>
      eapply T_Assign; [apply (IHt1 Gamma ST s (TyRef T0) U H1 Hs) | apply (IHt2 Gamma ST s T0 U H2 Hs)]
    end.
  - (* Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.

Fixpoint subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t T U
  (Ht : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T)
  (Hs : has_type Gamma ST s U) {struct t} :
  has_type Gamma ST (subst (length Gamma) s t) T.
Proof.
  destruct t; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - (* Var *)
    match goal with H : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = Some T |- _ => rename H into Hnth end.
    destruct (Nat.eqb_spec n (length Gamma)).
    + subst. rewrite nth_error_app_singleton in Hnth. inversion Hnth; subst. exact Hs.
    + intro Hneq.
      apply T_Var.
      destruct (Compare_dec.le_lt_dec (length Gamma) n) as [Hle | Hlt].
      { exfalso.
        assert (n > length Gamma) by lia.
        assert (Hnone : nth_error (Gamma ++ [U]) n = None).
        { apply nth_error_None. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
        rewrite Hnone in Hnth. inversion Hnth. }
      { apply nth_error_app_left_inv with (l2 := [U]) in Hnth; auto. }
  - (* Num *) apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *) apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_Succ; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t1 TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* Pred *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_Pred; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t2 TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* IsZero *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t3 TyNat |- _ =>
      apply T_IsZero; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t3 TyNat U H Hs) end.
  - (* If *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST ?tt1 TyBool,
      H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST ?tt2 ?TT,
      H3 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST ?tt3 ?TT |- _ =>
      apply T_If.
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s tt1 TyBool U H1 Hs).
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s tt2 TT U H2 Hs).
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s tt3 TT U H3 Hs)
    end.
  - (* Lam *)
    match goal with Hbody : has_type (T1 :: Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T2 |- _ =>
      apply T_Lam with (T1 := T1) (T2 := T2).
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing (T1 :: Gamma) ST (shift s) t T2 U); [exact Hbody | apply shift_typing; auto]
    end.
  - (* App *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1_0 (TyArrow ?T1 ?T2), H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2_0 ?T1 |- _ =>
      eapply T_App.
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t1_0 (TyArrow T1 T2) U H1 Hs).
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t2_0 T1 U H2 Hs)
    end.
  - (* Fix *)
    match goal with Hbody : has_type (T0 :: Gamma ++ [U]) ST t T0 |- _ =>
      eapply T_Fix.
      eapply (subst_preserves_typing (T0 :: Gamma) ST (shift s) t T0 U); [exact Hbody | apply shift_typing; auto]
    end.
  - (* Ref *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t ?T0 |- _ =>
      apply T_Ref; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t T0 U H Hs)
    end.
  - (* Deref *)
    match goal with H : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t (TyRef ?T0) |- _ =>
      apply T_Deref; eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t (TyRef T0) U H Hs)
    end.
  - (* Assign *)
    match goal with
    | H1 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t1_0 (TyRef ?T0), H2 : has_type (Gamma ++ [U]) ST t2_0 ?T0 |- _ =>
      eapply T_Assign; [eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t1_0 (TyRef T0) U H1 Hs) | eapply (subst_preserves_typing Gamma ST s t2_0 T0 U H2 Hs)]
    end.
  - (* Loc *) apply T_Loc. auto.
Qed.
